text:
This method of addition, which works for adding
any
number of
fractions, was
first explicitly
described in
general by
Brahmagupta
in the year 628 CE! We will describe the history of the development
of fractions in more
detail later in the chapter. For now, we simply
the
steps
in
Brahmagupta's
method
for
addition of
summarise
fractions.
